description:
src/repl.rs and src/test_runner.rs currently use eval::Interp (AST evaluator) for runtime execution. Switch them to the rebuilt ir_interp. The AST evaluator stays in place for macro expansion only (its permanent role).

## Acceptance

- REPL: `fz repl`, type `1 + 1`, get `2` via the IR path.
- `fz test fixtures/sample_tests.fz` runs the same as today (4 tests, 0 failures), now via IR.
- eval.rs::Interp loses its `apply` / `call_named` runtime entry points; only macro-expansion entry stays. The type rename promised by fz-ul4.23.2 lands here as a final cleanup (Interp → MacroEvaluator or similar).
title: Migrate REPL + test_runner onto ir_interp
